subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord, my refuge, my sanctuary, and my reliance! With my spirit, my heart and my inmost being do I earnestly implore Thee to grant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی و ملاذی و موئلی و معتمدی انی اتضرع الیک بروحی و قلبی و فوادی ان تدرک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @presence of; reunion with God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
